texto: We're human. We all occasionally wet ourselves. No one is really better than anyone else. We're just all trying to make it through the year as best we can. We screw up sometimes. We succeed sometimes. We laugh. We cry. We go on. Those are the things we should really share with each other this holiday season, right, if we dare send a letter? We should share the truth. We should share the insanity.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Wade Rouse que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “We're human. We all occasionally wet ourselves. No one is really better than anyone else. We're j…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, memoir, should, com foco em termino e reflexao.
